languages.text: "Потомство Ювенны во всей красе". {n}Железная ладонь Себериана непроизвольно хватает пустоту у его бедра, словно ища отсутствующий эфес.{/n} "Бахвальство, словесный яд и бесплодные интриги вместо деяний. Прискорбно. Мое слово таково, наследни{mf|к|ца}: докажите, что вы достойны моего имени, или я сочту, что пять веков назад Патент был незаконно узурпирован, и верну его себе".

"Juvenna's progeny in all its glory." {n}Seberian's iron hand involuntarily grasps the empty air at his hip, as if searching for a missing hilt.{/n} "Boasting, verbal poison, and barren intrigue in place of deeds. Deplorable. My word is this: prove yourself worthy of my name, or I shall deem the Warrant unlawfully usurped five centuries ago and take it back for myself."
languages.original_text: "Потомство Ювенны во всей красе". {n}Железная ладонь Себериана непроизвольно хватает пустоту у его бедра, словно ища отсутствующий эфес.{/n} "Бахвальство, словесный яд и бесплодные интриги вместо деяний. Прискорбно. Мое слово таково, наследни{mf|к|ца}: докажите, что вы достойны моего имени, или я сочту, что пять веков назад Патент был незаконно узурпирован, и верну его себе".

Deplorable. My word is this, heir: prove yourself worthy of my name, or I shall deem the Warrant unlawfully usurped five centuries ago and take it back for myself."

Deplorable. My word is this, heir: prove yourself worthy of my name, or I shall deem the Warrant unlawfully usurped five centuries ago and take it back for myself."

Deplorable. My word is this: prove yourself worthy of my name, or I shall deem the Warrant unlawfully usurped five centuries ago and take it back for myself."

languages.text: «La progenie de Juvenna en toda su gloria». {n}La mano de hierro de Seberian se cierra involuntariamente a unos centímetros de su cadera, como si buscase la empuñadura de una espada que no lleva al cinto.{/n} «Bravatas, ponzoña verbal e intrigas estériles en lugar de hechos. Deplorable. Lo que digo es esto: demuestre que es digno de llevar mi apellido o consideraré que la Patente fue usurpada ilícitamente hace quinientos años y la reclamaré yo mismo».
languages.original_text: "Juvenna's progeny in all its glory." {n}Seberian's iron hand involuntarily grasps the empty air at his hip, as if searching for a missing hilt.{/n} "Boasting, verbal poison, and barren intrigue in place of deeds. Deplorable. My word is this: prove yourself worthy of my name, or I shall deem the Warrant unlawfully usurped five centuries ago and take it back for myself."

traits.locale_text: «La progenie de Juvenna en toda su gloria». {n}La mano de hierro de Seberian se cierra involuntariamente a unos centímetros de su cadera, como si buscase la empuñadura de una espada que no lleva al cinto.{/n} «Bravatas, ponzoña verbal e intrigas estériles en lugar de hechos. Deplorable. Lo que digo es esto: demuestre que es digno de llevar mi apellido o consideraré que la Patente fue usurpada ilícitamente hace quinientos años y la reclamaré yo mismo».

languages.text: “尤文娜的后代，可真是尽得其真传啊。”{n}塞贝里安的铁手下意识地在腰侧空抓了一把，仿佛在寻找那早已不存在的剑柄。{/n}“夸夸其谈、言辞恶毒、不干实事，只搞些无用的阴谋诡计。真是可悲。你给我听好了：证明你配得上我的姓氏，否则我会认定五百年前的贸易授状遭到了非法篡夺，然后亲手把它拿回来。”
languages.original_text: "Juvenna's progeny in all its glory." {n}Seberian's iron hand involuntarily grasps the empty air at his hip, as if searching for a missing hilt.{/n} "Boasting, verbal poison, and barren intrigue in place of deeds. Deplorable. My word is this: prove yourself worthy of my name, or I shall deem the Warrant unlawfully usurped five centuries ago and take it back for myself."

traits.locale_text: “尤文娜的后代，可真是尽得其真传啊。”{n}塞贝里安的铁手下意识地在腰侧空抓了一把，仿佛在寻找那早已不存在的剑柄。{/n}“夸夸其谈、言辞恶毒、不干实事，只搞些无用的阴谋诡计。真是可悲。你给我听好了：证明你配得上我的姓氏，否则我会认定五百年前的贸易授状遭到了非法篡夺，然后亲手把它拿回来。”

languages.text: « La progéniture de Juvenna dans toute sa splendeur. » {n}La main de fer de Seberian se referme instinctivement sur le vide auprès de sa hanche, comme si elle cherchait la poignée d'une arme qui manque à l'appel.{/n} « Au lieu d'agir, vous vous répandez en fanfaronnades, en invectives et en intrigues stériles. Lamentable. Voilà ce que je vous propose : soit vous prouvez que vous êtes digne de porter mon nom, soit je considérerai que la lettre de marque a été usurpée illégalement il y a cinq siècles et je la reprendrai à mon compte. »
languages.original_text: "Juvenna's progeny in all its glory." {n}Seberian's iron hand involuntarily grasps the empty air at his hip, as if searching for a missing hilt.{/n} "Boasting, verbal poison, and barren intrigue in place of deeds. Deplorable. My word is this: prove yourself worthy of my name, or I shall deem the Warrant unlawfully usurped five centuries ago and take it back for myself."

traits.locale_text: « La progéniture de Juvenna dans toute sa splendeur. » {n}La main de fer de Seberian se referme instinctivement sur le vide auprès de sa hanche, comme si elle cherchait la poignée d'une arme qui manque à l'appel.{/n} « Au lieu d'agir, vous vous répandez en fanfaronnades, en invectives et en intrigues stériles. Lamentable. Voilà ce que je vous propose : soit vous prouvez que vous êtes digne de porter mon nom, soit je considérerai que la lettre de marque a été usurpée illégalement il y a cinq siècles et je la reprendrai à mon compte. »

languages.text: "Juvenna'nın dölü, tüm ihtişamıyla konuşuyor." {n}Seberian'ın demir eli, istemsizce kalçasındaki boş havayı kavrıyor ve sanki eksik bir kabzayı arıyor.{/n} "Eylemlerin yerini böbürlenme, sözlü zehir ve kısır entrikalar almış. Acınası. Sözüm şudur, adımı taşımaya layık olduğunu kanıtlamazsan Ruhsatname'nin beş yüzyıl önce haksız yere gasp edildiğini varsayar ve onu geri alırım."
languages.original_text: "Juvenna's progeny in all its glory." {n}Seberian's iron hand involuntarily grasps the empty air at his hip, as if searching for a missing hilt.{/n} "Boasting, verbal poison, and barren intrigue in place of deeds. Deplorable. My word is this: prove yourself worthy of my name, or I shall deem the Warrant unlawfully usurped five centuries ago and take it back for myself."

Acınası. Sözüm şudur, adımı taşımaya layık olduğunu kanıtlamazsan Ruhsatname'nin beş yüzyıl önce haksız yere gasp edildiğini varsayar ve onu geri alırım."

languages.text: 「ジュベナの子孫の栄光を。」{n}シベリアンの鉄の拳は、まるで欠けた柄を探しているかのように、腰の空気を掴む。{/n}「自慢、言葉の毒、行動の代わりに陰謀。嘆かわしい。私の言葉はこうだ。私の名に値する者でなければ、五百年前に不正に奪われた証書を取り戻す。」
languages.original_text: "Juvenna's progeny in all its glory." {n}Seberian's iron hand involuntarily grasps the empty air at his hip, as if searching for a missing hilt.{/n} "Boasting, verbal poison, and barren intrigue in place of deeds. Deplorable. My word is this: prove yourself worthy of my name, or I shall deem the Warrant unlawfully usurped five centuries ago and take it back for myself."

traits.locale_text: 「ジュベナの子孫の栄光を。」{n}シベリアンの鉄の拳は、まるで欠けた柄を探しているかのように、腰の空気を掴む。{/n}「自慢、言葉の毒、行動の代わりに陰謀。嘆かわしい。私の言葉はこうだ。私の名に値する者でなければ、五百年前に不正に奪われた証書を取り戻す。」

languages.text: "Juvennas Werk in seiner ganzen Pracht. {n}Seberians eiserne Hand tastet nach seiner Hüfte, als suche er den Griff eines Schwertes.{/n} "Prahlerei, vergiftete Worte und plumpe Intrigen anstelle von Taten. Erbärmlich. Deshalb: Erweist Euch meines Namens als würdig oder ich erkläre den Handelsbrief als unrechtmäßig erworben und hole ihn mir zurück."
languages.original_text: "Juvenna's progeny in all its glory." {n}Seberian's iron hand involuntarily grasps the empty air at his hip, as if searching for a missing hilt.{/n} "Boasting, verbal poison, and barren intrigue in place of deeds. Deplorable. My word is this: prove yourself worthy of my name, or I shall deem the Warrant unlawfully usurped five centuries ago and take it back for myself."
